title: [CI] flaky regression test in coordinator pipeline
body:
The coordinator pipeline tests fail intermittently.

File: plugins/autonomous-dev/lib/coordinator.py
See tests/regression/test_coordinator.py for context.

title: [CI] coordinator pipeline regression on macOS
body:
On macOS the coordinator pipeline fails when running tests/regression/test_coordinator.py.

Referenced files:
- plugins/autonomous-dev/lib/coordinator.py
- tests/regression/test_coordinator.py

title: [CI] coordinator regression: pipeline cleanup fails
body:
Cleanup phase of coordinator pipeline regression fails on Linux runners.

plugins/autonomous-dev/lib/coordinator.py is the entry point.

title: [CI] hook installation race condition
body:
Hook installation races with the settings template generator.

plugins/autonomous-dev/hooks/unified_pre_tool.py

title: [CI] settings template hook installation order
body:
Settings template generator runs before hook installation in some flows.

plugins/autonomous-dev/hooks/unified_pre_tool.py and lib/settings_generator.py both touch the same files.

title: [HARDENING] secret scrubbing missing for slack tokens
body: Secret scrubbing in plugins/autonomous-dev/lib/runtime_data_aggregator.py does not cover slack tokens. Hook entry point plugins/autonomous-dev/hooks/unified_pre_tool.py should also be audited.

title: [HARDENING] secret scrubbing missing for AWS tokens
body: Additional secret patterns needed in plugins/autonomous-dev/lib/runtime_data_aggregator.py — covers AWS access keys and gcp service-account JSON. The same file plugins/autonomous-dev/hooks/unified_pre_tool.py uses similar regexes that should be unified.

title: [TRENDS] hook block rate trending up week over week
body: Hook block rate has trended up by 12% week over week. Investigate causes.

title: [Maintenance] update dependency hypothesis to latest
body: Hypothesis is two minor versions behind upstream.

title: no tag prefix here at all
body: Stray issue with no bracket prefix.

title: [CI-warning] doc-master soft warning on PROJECT.md
body: doc-master emits a soft warning when PROJECT.md changes.
